title: Ampaez
compiled_truth: Ampaez is an external contact at [Earthlink](companies/earthlink). Over the corpus period (2001-01-08 to 2002-02-06), Ampaez sent 37 and received 66 emails, totalling 103 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Griffith](people/john-griffith) (37), [Linda Goetz](people/linda-goetz) (1), [Powell Lisa](people/powell-lisa) (1), [Brookover Timothy](people/brookover-timothy) (1).
